REGENTFEMPORTRAITS.mod_desc: Replaces Regent's card portraits with beautiful anime-style images and provides multiple anti-aliasing filter options
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-ENABLE_ANTIALIASING_F: Enables texture filtering for card portraits to reduce jaggies when scaled down. Recommended for better visual quality.
Choose the texture filtering mode for card portraits. Different modes affect sharpness and edge smoothness. Linear + Anisotropic is recommended.
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-SELECTED_FILTER_MODE-: Sharp, pixel art style, may have noticeable jaggies. Suitable for pixel art aesthetics.
Smooth display, slightly blurry edges. Suitable for large image display.
Balances sharpness and performance, uses lower resolution mipmaps when scaled down.
Smooth edges, reduces jaggies, maintains scaling quality with mipmaps.
High sharpness, maintains clarity at oblique angles, anisotropic filtering improves angle viewing.
Smoothest filtering effect, recommended for scaled down previews. Combines linear filtering, mipmaps, and anisotropic filtering.
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-TEXTURE_QUALITY.title: Texture Quality
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-TEXTURE_QUALITY.hover: Controls texture compression level. Higher quality uses more VRAM but provides clearer card images.
